---
title: "Censorious Trusting Swallowtail"
authors:
  - name: "Magellan-z"
    url: "https://github.com/Magellan-z"
  - name: "Josia716"
    url: "https://github.com/Josia716"
  - name: "HannesDZPN"
    url: "https://github.com/HannesDZPN"
authors_links: "[Magellan-z](https://github.com/Magellan-z), [Josia716](https://github.com/Josia716), [HannesDZPN](https://github.com/HannesDZPN)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_censorious_trusting_swallowtail_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
